name: Maple Glaxed Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
Or 2 lbs. fresh sweet potatoes, pared and cooked in water to cover until tender.
1. Place butter in a baking dish and place in the oven as it preheats.
2. Prepare the potatoes. They should be left whole if small, or cut into 2-inch chunks if large.
3. Turn the potatoes in melted butter in the baking dish until coated on all sides.
4. Drizzle syrup evenly over the potatoes.
5. Sprinkle with sunflower nuts.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until heated through.
7. Transfer to a serving dish.
Servings - 4
You can prepare the dish ahead and bake it just before serving. I've made this recipe the last couple of years and everyone seems to like it even better than the marshmallow-topped ones.
